description: Native English (American). Female, late teens. Bright, clear quality. Persona: irreverent salvage-hacker. Emotion: quick, bold, wry. Light, fast voice pitched young, with flat Detroit vowels over a faint Korean-American household cadence; clipped and casual until a problem turns serious, then suddenly exact.
text: Everybody says be careful, like careful ever fixed anything. [scoffs] They threw this whole world away... so I'm gonna open it up, give it a name, and make it work. [excited] One more house on the mesh.
